GitHubApiData.name: NuvioDesktop-unofficial
GitHubApiData.description: NuvioDesktop - unofficial-platform media streaming app (Windows + Linux) with MPV playback, external player support, subtitle delay, and Trakt integration

TranslatedDescriptions.ja: NuvioDesktop - MPV再生、外部プレーヤー対応、字幕遅延、Trakt連携を備えた非公式プラットフォームのメディアストリーミングアプリ（Windows＋Linux）
TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: NuvioDesktop - 非官方跨平台媒体流应用（Windows + Linux），支持MPV播放、外部播放器、字幕延迟和Trakt集成。
TranslatedDescriptions.en: NuvioDesktop - unofficial platform media streaming app (Windows + Linux) featuring MPV playback, external player support, subtitle delay, and Trakt integration.
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: NuvioDesktop - MPV 재생, 외부 플레이어 지원, 자막 지연, Trakt 통합 기능을 갖춘 비공식 플랫폼 미디어 스트리밍 앱 (Windows + Linux)
TranslatedDescriptions.es: NuvioDesktop - aplicación de streaming multimedia no oficial para plataformas (Windows + Linux) con reproducción MPV, soporte para reproductores externos, retraso de subtítulos e integración con Trakt
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: NuvioDesktop - application de streaming média non officielle multiplateforme (Windows + Linux) avec lecture MPV, support des lecteurs externes, décalage des sous-titres et intégration Trakt
